title: senna cushina
intro: Senna cushina, a plant native to tropical Africa, is a member of the Fabaceae family and is commonly known as a medicinal herb. Its medicinal properties lie in its rich content of anthraquinones, which are responsible for its cathartic and laxative effects. The health benefits of senna cushina include relief from constipation, diarrhea, and dysentery, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Senna cushina can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies in the form of capsules, tablets, or dried extracts.
